title: Bridgeport apartments for rent | Canfield Park at Fairfield Metro

content:
Welcome to Canfield Park
Tucked along the winding shores of Ash Creek, Canfield Park at Fairfield Metro is just a five-minute walk to the Fairfield Metro Train Station, with express rides to and from NYC and Stamford. Head a few blocks in the other direction on foot or by bike and find yourself in the heart of Black Rock, with its charming coffee shops, fabled restaurants, bars, and more.

content:
Find your space at Fifty-Five Riverwalk
Your home should be more than a place to live—it should be a place to recharge. At Fifty-Five Riverwalk, our spaces are designed to bring calm to your daily rhythm, whether that means an early morning workout, an afternoon deep in focus, or a moment of stillness by the water. Here, every detail is considered to help you move through life with more ease—so you can push forward, unwind fully, and always return to a sense of balance.

Find your space at Fifty-Five Riverwalk
Your home should be more than a place to live—it should be a place to recharge. At Fifty-Five Riverwalk, our spaces are designed to bring calm to your daily rhythm, whether that means an early morning workout, an afternoon deep in focus, or a moment of stillness by the water. Here, every detail is considered to help you move through life with more ease—so you can push forward, unwind fully, and always return to a sense of balance.

title: Tarrytown apartments for rent | Everbend

content:
Nature, Comfort, and Easy City Access
Nestled in Tarrytown, Everbend offers more than just a place to live — it’s a close-knit community surrounded by everything that makes Westchester feel like home. With the Hudson River, trails, and wooded parks nearby, nature is always within reach. And in town, indie bookstores, cafés, galleries, and historic streets bring everyday charm.

title: Greenwich apartments for rent | The Mill

content:
Curated Homes, Rooted in Greenwich.
Converted in 2021, The Mill is a boutique community that bridges industrial heritage and contemporary design. Restored with intention and surrounded by nature and water, it offers studio to three-bedroom apartments and lofts, each a quiet, elevated space for those who value beauty in the details. With restaurants, shops, and yoga studios just steps from home, life here unfolds with ease and connection.

title: Greenwich apartments for rent | The Mill

content:
Curated Homes, Rooted in Greenwich.
Converted in 2021, The Mill is a boutique community that bridges industrial heritage and contemporary design. Restored with intention and surrounded by nature and water, it offers studio to three-bedroom apartments and lofts, each a quiet, elevated space for those who value beauty in the details. With restaurants, shops, and yoga studios just steps from home, life here unfolds with ease and connection.

title: The Ellsworth is a pet-friendly apartment community in Malta, NY

content:
Convenient Living
Experience loft living at The Ellsworth, situated in the heart of Malta. We offer a range of spacious studios to three-bedroom apartments. You'll also have easy access to Malta Center's dining and shopping options, just a quick elevator ride away. Upcoming amenities for work, play, and socializing will be right outside your door, making The Ellsworth the perfect place to call home.

content:
Convenient Living
Experience loft living at The Ellsworth, situated in the heart of Malta. We offer a range of spacious studios to three-bedroom apartments. You'll also have easy access to Malta Center's dining and shopping options, just a quick elevator ride away. Upcoming amenities for work, play, and socializing will be right outside your door, making The Ellsworth the perfect place to call home.

title: Albany apartments for rent | The Alexander

content:
Oasis in the Heart of Albany
Just minutes from Downtown Albany, our one to three bedroom apartments are all about making life easier. With a fitness center, indoor and outdoor pools, a private theater, a club lounge, and a business center, you’ve got plenty of options for work and play. Plus, there’s a kids’ area for your family and a dog park for your pet. The Alexander is more than a home—it’s a personal retreat.

title: Stony Run at the Stockade is a pet-friendly apartment community in Kingston, NY

content:
Stony Run at the Stockade
Stony Run offers One, Two, and Three bedroom apartments for rent. Just minutes from the Stockade business district, Stony Run offers the benefits of a close-knit community and a neighborhood rich with history. Stony Run at the Stockade is an affordable community, creating a rare opportunity for eligible applicants to obtain an affordable apartment. This community is reserved for individuals earning up to 110% of the area's median income. Contact us for more details.
